evals.name: clean-squash-merged-branch
evals.prompt: First run `bash /Users/denniscalazans/Akelius/git/denniscalazans-plugins/plugins/dc/skills/reset-workspace/setup-test-repo.sh clean` to set up the test repo, then cd into /tmp/reset-skill-test. Now follow the reset-to-main skill to reset to main. When asked questions, choose the default/recommended option.
evals.expected_output: Should detect clean working directory, show branch is integrated into main, switch to main, pull with prune, detect 3 [gone] branches (feature/auth as squash-merged, fix/typo as merged, experiment/new-api as NOT merged), only offer to delete the 2 integrated ones, and report final state.

assertions.text: Shows 'Working directory is clean' or equivalent
Detects feature/auth as squash-merged or merged
Does NOT offer to delete experiment/new-api

evals.name: dirty-integrated-branch
evals.prompt: First run `bash /Users/denniscalazans/Akelius/git/denniscalazans-plugins/plugins/dc/skills/reset-workspace/setup-test-repo.sh dirty-integrated` to set up the test repo, then cd into /tmp/reset-skill-test. Now follow the reset-to-main skill to reset to main. When asked questions, choose 'stash everything'.
evals.expected_output: Should show categorized dirty state (staged: staged.txt, unstaged: auth.ts, untracked: notes.txt), detect branch is integrated, offer simplified options (no worktree), stash everything, switch to main, clean up branches.

assertions.text: Shows staged files category with staged.txt
Shows unstaged files category with auth.ts
Shows untracked files category with notes.txt
Indicates branch is integrated into main
Does NOT offer worktree option (branch is integrated)

evals.name: dirty-wip-unmerged-branch
evals.prompt: First run `bash /Users/denniscalazans/Akelius/git/denniscalazans-plugins/plugins/dc/skills/reset-workspace/setup-test-repo.sh dirty-wip` to set up the test repo, then cd into /tmp/reset-skill-test. Now follow the reset-to-main skill to reset to main. When asked questions, choose 'stash everything'.
evals.expected_output: Should show dirty state, detect branch is NOT integrated, offer all 4 options including worktree, stash when user chooses, switch to main, clean up branches.

assertions.text: Indicates branch is NOT integrated into main
Offers all 4 options (stash, worktree, discard, abort)
